Interface ITerminalConfiguration

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a network terminal configuration.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("54548E7F-A780-4FC0-AEF7-4920A36E7326")]
public interface ITerminalConfiguration

Properties

CreationTime

Returns the creation time.

object CreationTime { get; }

Property Value

object

Sample Snippet

Returns the default configuration path.

string DefaultConfigurationPath { get; }

string

int

Terminal[int, int, string]

Returns the terminal.

bool Terminal[int Index, out int TerminalID, out string TerminalName] { get; }

Index int
TerminalID int
TerminalName string

Returns the terminal count.
